notes: Verified with gh on 2026-07-07. LumenLoop API/backend intake remains unclear: the public org has skills/data/feed repos, but no obvious public API or feedback tracker.
Algolia ranking-only docs findings may not have a clear public intake even though developers.stellar.org content lives in stellar/stellar-docs.

default.rule: Target the source repository that owns the referenced skill; never file against this repo's mirror.

stellar-light-scout.alsoAvailable: The API exposes keyless POST /api/feedback, but GitHub issues are the primary intake for durable upstream delivery from this repo.

stellar-docs.contentRule: developers.stellar.org content and content-structure findings file in stellar/stellar-docs.
stellar-docs.rankingRule: Pure Algolia ranking/tokenization findings may need docs/search-owner triage; record intake unclear per finding when the repo cannot plausibly own the search behavior.

lumenloop.decision: unclear — API/content findings have no confirmed public tracker

sd-001.reason: Algolia ranking/tokenization behavior; not clearly owned by stellar/stellar-docs issue intake.

sd-002.reason: Ranking-only finding and currently proposed/possibly fixed.

sd-006.reason: Crawler/indexed content structure for docs pages.

sd-007.reason: Docs content ambiguity; in-charter per README.

sd-008.reason: Official Software Versions content lags live Mainnet activation and stable release feeds.

sd-009.reason: Developer docs omit the canonical SEP-6 interactive-component deprecation status.
